productDisplayName: Puma Unisex FTPA Quarters Brown Socks
description: Wear these socks with trainers when you're working out or to keep your feet comfortable when wearing formal shoes. puma ensures that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Pack of one pairs of ankle length socks in brownMade of 70% cotton, 29% nylon and 1% elastaneBranded rib at opening to grip above ankleThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitSock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
